title: When AI Finishes The Homework, Parents Face A Harder Question
description: (MENAFN - Khaama Press) A mother realized that her son had been relying on an artificial intelligence tool to complete his homework, often without understanding the work himself. Her account, ...

title: AI companies' greatest risk isn't AI, says Calvin Lo
description: While technology can be replicated and capital secured in any market, an artificial intelligence company’s true value ultimately lies in its founders’ capabilities, said Calvin Lo, chief executive of R.E. Lee International.
